title: Sopito Aluminum Tin Cans, 24pcs 60ml/2oz Metal Round Tins Small Tin Screw Lid Containers Empty Travel Jars for Candles, Salve, Cosmetics
features: Package: 24 pcs screw top round tins. Capacity: 2 oz (60ml); 2.5 inches in diameter and 1 inch in height.
Material: Made of high quality metal aluminum, the tin containers are beautifully-shaped, lightweight but durable, also non-toxic, non-odor.
Sealing Design: The metal tins can effectively avoid leakage with the tightly sealed spiral twist cap structure. You can use them for various storage without worrying about corroding or leaking.

Multipurpose: These empty aluminum cans can be widely applied to making candles and DIY cosmetics, or storing DIY ointments, creams, salves, balms, samples, tea, beads, etc. to meet your needs. These storage cans are convenient and portable for travel.
Risk-free Purchase: With the confidence of quality and pursuit of your perfect satisfaction, if you find any quality issue, please contact us for assistance, there is no risk in your purchase!
description: Product Description Sopito 2 Oz Screw Top Round Aluminum Tin Cans Key Features: Compact and lightweight for easy and convenient carrying Screw thread lids for tight sealing to store liquids or solids Bulk pack for multipurpose use to meet home, office and school needs No sharp edges, all edges rounded and seamlessly formed High quality aluminum material makes them reusable, recyclable and anti-corrosion Specifications: Quantity: 24 pieces Material: Aluminum Capacity: 2 oz (60 ml) Size: 2.5 inches in diameter; 1 inch in height Wide Application: Small size for easy carrying to store pills or vitamins without taking the whole bottles when you go out. Great to store small crafts accessories, such as beads and small jewelry, craft parts, nail accessories etc. Perfect for lip balms, essential oil, ointments and cosmetics, and it's convenient for traveling to carry with. Can be used as DIY candle making containers, to create a romantic and lovely atmosphere. Also ideal for other small items such as candies, tea, buttons, coins, screws, staples, paper clips, etc. 15 ml Aluminum Tin Cans 30 ml Aluminum Tin Cans 60 ml Aluminum Tin Cans 120 ml Aluminum Tin Cans Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 290 4.7 out of 5 stars 289 4.7 out of 5 stars 289 4.7 out of 5 stars 289 Price £13.99 £ 13 . 99 — no data £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 Color Silver Silver Silver Silver Material Aluminum Aluminum Aluminum Aluminum Item Dimensions 1.6 inches diameter 2.1 inches diameter 2.5 inches diameter 3.2 inches diameter 0.7 inches in height 0.8 inches in height 1 inches in height 1 inches in height Package Includes 24 x 0.5 oz Aluminum Tin Cans 24 x 1 oz Aluminum Tin Cans 24 x 2 oz Aluminum Tin Cans 24 x 4 oz Aluminum Tin Cans
